title: Encounters Page and Some Minor Fixes

body.text: I tried rushing out this new feature so people could make use of it with the new update. It's still an early version and more details and content will be added in the future, but it has a significant manual component so it's going to take a while for me to go back and fill in past content, especially since I'm also working on other updates and new features. Hope people enjoy it though!

texts: Added the Encounters page. Users can view details on notable encounters in the game, post comments, and have their builds appear if they use the corresponding tag.

Keyword Solver: Added a small bias for it to use newer identities first. This is especially noticeable if using the "Faster" search mode, but will still have a smaller effect on "Balanced" and "Variety". The solver is still randomized in the end to provide better variety in the search results so it may not always show the newest identities.
Added "Handheld Mirror" to the Universal Gifts page.
Changed scrolling behavior for Collections, allowing horizontal scroll by dragging its items in addition to shift-scrolling.
Fixed "Spicebush, Glasses, and Mailed Letter", "Resplendence", and "Cultivation" not having the "Hard Only" tag.
Fixed the [Target Fixed] skill tag not showing up as green.
Fixed Photoelectricity's icon not showing up.
Added the numerous changes to language (with) in relevant identities and statuses.

Added standard Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages to comply with an additional verification stage on Google's accounts system. This will hopefully help lessen account creation and login issues during traffic spikes.
